_comment: Claude Code NATIVE-tool governance (the 'deep' half). Merge into .claude/settings.json. This PreToolUse hook routes every native tool call (Bash/Edit/Write/Read/WebFetch/...) through the real kernel via `harness cc-hook`, which denies tainted egress (taint floor) and asks before destructive Bash. Additive + fail-open. Pair it with hosts/claude-code.mcp.json (the MCP 'shallow' half) for full coverage. Replace /ABS/PATH and ensure `harness` is on PATH or use an absolute binary path.
